question_text: Which statement correctly describes the density of the three states of matter?

options.label: A
options.text: Gas is the densest because particles move fastest

options.label: B
options.text: Solid is the densest because particles are tightly packed together

options.label: C
options.text: Liquid is always denser than solids

options.label: D
options.text: All three states have the same density

explanation: Solids are generally the densest because their particles are tightly packed together with strong forces holding them. Liquids have medium density, and gases have the lowest density because particles are far apart.
